pi_items.source: Found exactly this path assigned to PROJECT_DIR in setup_task.sh.

Analyzed smart_dedup.py created in setup_task.sh. Confirmed it has a partial hashing bug (reads only first 2048 bytes), a crash bug on linking (fails to remove target before os.link), and a size filter bug (ignores files < 1024 bytes).
Checked verifier.py which explicitly sets 'passed = score >= 85'.

privileged_info_summary: The task takes place in the project directory /home/ga/PycharmProjects/smart_dedup. The provided smart_dedup.py contains three specific bugs: partial_hashing (only hashes the first 2KB of files), link_crash (fails to remove an existing target file before calling os.link, causing FileExistsError), and size_filter (arbitrarily ignores files smaller than 1024 bytes). The verification logic explicitly sets the pass threshold to 85 points.
